MY MORNING ROUTINE AS A DENTIST 🔔 1️⃣ Walk in and start setting the room up 🔧 💻 Computers on 📋 Check the day list 🦷 Communicate to my nurse what we’ve got coming in 2️⃣ Then the important part… setting the vibe 😎 📺 Ceiling TV = animal documentaries 🐋  ( NO bugs or insects 🐛 , trust me from experience💀) 🌍 Wall TV = chilled music + holiday videos Makes the room feel way less clinical ✅ 3️⃣ Then it’s: 👨‍⚕️ Scrubs on 🔍 Loupes ready 📸 Camera setup 🔋 Spare batteries charging because an incomplete set up gives chance for suboptimal care Quick medical history check for the first patient 📋 🥽 Loupes on 😷 Mask on 🧤 Glove up Ready to work 🦷⚙️🥶 #dentist #dentalstudent #dentalschool #dentistry #dentistryworld

Raising Cane’s-Style Chicken Fingers With Cane’s Sauce. Ingredients: For the Chicken: - 2 lb chicken breast, cut into strips - Oil for frying For the Wet Batter: - 2 cups buttermilk - 2 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tbsp black pepper - Salt to taste - 1 tbsp smoked paprika For the Dry Batter: - 2 cups all-purpose flour - 3 tbsp cornstarch - Salt to taste - 1 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tsp black pepper - 1 tsp smoked paprika For the Cane’s Sauce: - 1 cup mayonnaise - 4 tbsp ketchup - 2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce - 1 tbsp garlic powder - 1 tsp black pepper - Salt to taste - 1 tsp smoked paprika Instructions: 1. Prepare the wet batter by whisking together buttermilk, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and smoked paprika. Add the chicken strips to the wet batter and marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight. 2. Prepare the dry batter by whisking together flour, cornstarch, salt, garlic powder, black pepper, and smoked paprika. 3. Remove the chicken from the wet batter, allowing excess to drip off, then coat each strip in the dry batter. 4. Deep-fry the coated chicken strips in hot oil (about 350°F) until golden brown and cooked through, approximately 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through. 5. Prepare the Cane’s Sauce by whisking together mayonnaise, ketchup,Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, black pepper, salt, and smoked paprika. 6. Serve the crispy chicken fingers with Cane’s Sauce. #canessauce #raisingcanes #friedchicken #chickentenders #Recipe

Boots on the ground journalism on what to expect at the 1st @YesStyle store in the US (love how they launched with zero marketing 😆) Main takeaways: ✨ Smaller than average Sephora/Ulta ✨ Great selection of Korean + Japanese makeup and skincare, especially JBeauty- it was my first time seeing some Japanese products (like my beloved FUJIKO dry shampoo) in person at a store in the US which was cool ✨ Testers out for everything so you can really feel and see colors & formulas ✨ AUTHENTIC Korean sunscreens and not the inferior US versions! I was so excited and yapping to my sister about Tocobo, the girl next to me started asking me for SPF recs which I definitely gave ✨ Pricing in general slightly higher than website but did see items that were below, hard to do a true comparison since there are constant sales on YS.com Hope this was helpful and let me know if you want to see me share my top JBeauty & KBeauty product picks from what I saw at the store.  What do you want to see at the Yesstyle store? #yesstyle #bayareatiktok #kbeauty #jbeauty #yesstylestore

here’s my favorite toxic study method that helped me get a 4.0 GPA and as honestly never been talked about and is really secret in my opinion. building a connection with your teachers one of the best things you can do because in not only makes it where you have a sense of accountability when you show up to class turn in work and all this other stuff, but also it improves the method and detail that you were gonna get when you study since you’re going to be asking better questions showing up to office hours etc. Now I’m not saying, be best friends and all that stuff but be a familiar face   #studytok #studymotivation #StudyTips #studymethod  ##CapCut
